params.name: Arabian Bronze Hand
params.description:
On Aug 30, 622 BC, the Arabian Bronze Hand was created by a group of craftsmen and offered at the altar of the god.
This bronze hand was cast by a craftsman from more than 2,600 years ago. From the posture of the fingers to the folds of the knuckles, every detail is extremely realistic. Ancient inscriptions engraved on the back of the hand note that the owner of the hand was named Wahabitarabu. He commissioned the craftsman to make this bronze hand based on his own right hand so that he could …
